message:
fix(pages): only validate Cloudflare credentials when target is cloudflare

Move the account_id/api_token pair validation inside a target check so that
GitHub Pages and local deployments don't erroneously require Cloudflare
credentials to be set.

Previously, the validation would reject configs where only one of the two
Cloudflare credentials was set, even when deploying to GitHub Pages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
